system.description:
Siege Engine is the Suppressor discipline for runners whose answer to a fortified position is to dismantle the fortification. Practitioners specialize in heavy automatic weapons fed by oversized magazines, vehicle-mounted platforms ripped off their mounts, and shoulder-fired packages that should require a tripod. They have learned to brace, to compensate, and to keep firing through recoil that would put a normal operator in physical therapy.

On the job, the Siege Engine Suppressor is the runner the team brings out when the obstacle is structural. Their entry feature is Wall Breaker: their sustained fire treats cover and light structures as if they had reduced damage thresholds, and a single sustained burst can punch a usable opening through most non-reinforced walls.
system.grants: Wall Breaker: sustained fire reduces cover/light-structure thresholds; can breach non-reinforced walls.

wizard.tagline: Make the building stop being a building
